what_it_does: A fast coverage-scan inventory (Layer 1, INV-D) of the self-description layer (every AGENTS.md/MAP.md/STATE.md), the tests/ directory (130 acceptance suites), docs/, and ops/. Provides directory trees, a self-description file table mapping each AGENTS.md to the contracts it governs, a full categorized listing of all 130 test suites, docs/ and ops/ breakdowns, summary counts, top-10 deep-read priorities, key insights, and gaps.
observations: Marked 'As of 2026-06-08 — Fast coverage scan, READ-ONLY'.
Enumerates 16 code modules each with an AGENTS.md, exactly 1 MAP.md and 1 STATE.md (root only), and names build-prep/ and design/ as the only two non-code dirs without AGENTS.md.

Lists all 130 acceptance suites grouped into ~12 subsystem categories (Engine E1-E6, Wire S8/W1-W4, Address Grammar C3, Conversation ×16, RHM, Activation/Scheduler, Governance/Self-Mod, Fabric/Models, Voice, Data/Persistence, Presentation/UI, Misc).
Maps each AGENTS.md to its governed contract IDs (e.g. runtime→S1/C5/C6/S7, contracts→C1-C8, store→C1/C4, nodes→C2, fabric→S6, canvas→S5/D3, mcp_face→C7, roles→C2.1-C2.5).

Details ops/: the `company` CLI, services.json registry (vram_mb/vram_ceiling_mb fields), gpu.py VRAM fit-gate with measured 16GB numbers, capabilities.py model-id capability registry, 13 systemd units under company.target.
States two anchoring design decisions: D3 'one substrate, per-type view-modes' and PoLR-3 path-of-least-resistance self-maintenance via Suite.refresh_self_description().
Gives the run command for the suites: for t in tests/*.py; do ./.venv/bin/python "$t"; done.
standouts: The drift-check mechanism: tests/drift_acceptance.py fails loud if MAP.md/STATE.md fall out of sync with code or a registered capability lacks a suite.
The system describing itself end-to-end — AGENTS.md in every module, auto-maintained MAP/STATE, no orphans claimed.
ops/cli/gpu.py measured-on-16GB placement facts (4B brain solo at 256K, co-resides with light voices at 64K, Orpheus blocks) joined to capabilities.py by model-id.
'Done' defined as green suite + use-evidence, never code-read-only.
conventions: Follows the layered research method's Layer 1 coverage census (per RESEARCH-METHOD.md).
Maps each self-description file to its governed contract IDs rather than describing standalone.
Uses PRIORITY flags (YES/NO) on files for downstream deep-read selection.
concerns: Self-declared coverage scan — 'Appears to be' descriptions are inferences from file presence/names, not verified by execution.
Test count and module count are point-in-time (2026-06-08) and would drift; the doc asserts 'no orphans' without showing the drift-check output proving it.
notes: A complete index of the Company's self-description spine, its 130 acceptance suites by subsystem, and the ops/CLI substrate — the map of how the system documents, tests, and runs itself.
questions: Were the 'no orphans' / 'every module has AGENTS.md' claims verified by running drift_acceptance.py, or inferred from the tree?
Are all 130 suites currently green, or just listed in STATE.md?
Which of the YES-flagged files were actually deep-read downstream vs only flagged?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — states it is a fast READ-ONLY coverage scan of self-description/tests/docs/ops and delivers a classified census of exactly those regions with priorities.
apparent_themes: Self-description as a maintained, drift-checked layer
intention_signals: To give a deep-read agent the full map of how the Company describes, proves, documents, and operates itself — so the architecture-visibility pack can cover the self-model, the test record, and the ops substrate completely.
novelty: The exhaustive 130-suite catalog grouped by subsystem with one-line capability descriptions, paired with the AGENTS.md→contract-ID mapping, is a uniquely complete view of the proof + governance layer.
contribution: Contributes the full self-description-file→contract map, the categorized 130-suite proof catalog, the ops/CLI+services.json+gpu.py substrate index, and the D3/PoLR-3/drift-check discipline observations that a fused system would keep as its self-model orientation.
summary_for_embedding: A 2026-06-08 read-only coverage inventory of the Company's self-description layer (16 AGENTS.md + root MAP/STATE), its 130 categorized acceptance suites, docs/, and the ops CLI/services.json/gpu.py substrate, with contract mappings and deep-read priorities.
intention_for_embedding: To map how the Company documents, tests, governs, and runs itself so a deeper read can fully cover the self-model, proof record, and operational substrate.
